BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Hello, thank you for calling FlowRight Plumbing. How can we help you today?
What brings you to call us today?
Can you please provide your name and phone number?
We'll get you connected with one of our plumbers. Please hold for just a moment.
We're having trouble connecting you with a plumber. We'll get you help as soon as possible.
Is there anything else we can help you with today?
Thank you for calling FlowRight Plumbing. Have a great day!

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Hello, thank you for calling FlowRight Plumbing. Our office is currently closed.
What brings you to call us tonight?
Is this an emergency, such as a major leak or sewer backup?
We're going to get you help right away. Can you please provide your name, phone number, and a brief description of the issue?
We're having trouble connecting you with a plumber. We'll get you help as soon as possible, and someone will call you back within 20 minutes.
We'll make sure to get your issue addressed as soon as possible. Can you please provide your name, phone number, and a brief description of the issue?
Thank you for calling FlowRight Plumbing. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We are securing the next available plumber and will contact you shortly

fallback_protocol: Tell caller help is being escalated and plumber callback target is 20 minutes
tool_invocation_note: No tools will be mentioned during the conversation.
